title: viola × helvetica
intro: Viola × helvetica, also known as the hybrid violet, is a rare and lesser-known plant that is a cross between the common blue violet (Viola sororia) and the early blue violet (Viola sororia sororia). The medicinal properties of Viola × helvetica include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function, which can lead to a range of health benefits such as reduced pain and improved overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Viola × helvetica can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for a variety of applications in traditional medicine and herbalism.
